overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit urban underpass at night, transitioning from a covered walkway to an open plaza and finally into a dimly lit parking garage. The environment features futuristic advertisements, wet reflective surfaces, and cyberpunk aesthetics with dominant teal and orange neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway beneath overpass, passing trash and debris on wet ground

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Matapang Coffee on building wall
massive concrete elevated highway structure overhead
tall pillar with multiple digital screens showing advertisements
scattered trash and rubble accumulated against the wall
green and orange neon tubes illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, characterized by wet asphalt and cyberpunk neon lighting. A prominent Matapang Coffee billboard dominates the right wall while trash and debris litter the ground. The camera moves steadily forward through this enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit plaza with safety barriers under overpass

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into wider plaza area with yellow safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza area approaching transit hub entrance

notable_agents.action: person standing near yellow barriers facing away from camera

entered.detail: striped safety barriers blocking off construction or restricted area
tall pole with bright overhead lighting
large illuminated entrance to underground transit station
vehicles parked along the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider transit plaza beneath the overpass, marked by yellow and black safety barriers. The camera passes a standing pedestrian and approaches the illuminated entrance to a transit hub, with parked cars visible to the right. The Matapang Coffee billboard disappears from view as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza under highway overpass

events.description: camera begins following woman in white crop top and teal pants walking ahead
woman turns left toward parking garage entrance

agents.ego_description: following the woman through the plaza as she walks toward the garage entrance

pedestrian walking in same direction near concrete planter

entered.detail: large concrete planter containing palm trees

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a woman in a white crop top through an open pedestrian plaza beneath the highway overpass. The environment features palm tree planters and digital billboards while other pedestrians walk in the same direction. The transit hub structure looms ahead as the target character turns toward a parking garage entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with neon accent lighting

events.description: entering covered parking garage from open plaza, lighting shifts to artificial blue and yellow
moving deeper into garage where lighting becomes dimmer and more yellow

agents.ego_description: walking into the dimly lit parking garage, passing concrete pillars and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: metal roll-up doors for parking bays with warning symbols
massive square concrete support pillars
horizontal blue neon tubes illuminating the left wall
large metal toolbox or equipment chest
red sedan parked in the garage with open hood

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit multi-level parking garage, transitioning from the neon-lit plaza to artificial lighting. Concrete pillars line the left side while blue neon strips provide accent lighting. A red car with its hood open becomes visible in the center of the frame as the camera moves deeper into the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground parking level with abandoned vehicles and work area

events.description: slowing down and approaching group of characters gathered around red car with open hood

agents.ego_description: approaching the group near the red car, focusing on the character with spiky red hair

notable_agents.action: man with spiky red hair and tattoos leaning against red car with arms crossed
woman with red bandana standing near work bench facing the car

entered.detail: metal workbench with tools and equipment
yellow warning triangle painted on metal roll-up door
blue and gray barrels stacked near the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a group of characters gathered around the red car in the dimly lit parking garage. A man with distinctive spiky red hair and full arm tattoos stands with arms crossed leaning against the vehicle, while a woman with a red bandana stands nearby. The environment features work benches, tool chests, and warning signs on the metal roll-up doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit urban corridor into a dimly lit industrial parking garage. It begins in a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past a prominent Matapang Coffee billboard and wet asphalt littered with debris. As the corridor opens into a wider transit plaza, the camera passes yellow safety barriers and pedestrians before following a woman in a white crop top toward a looming transit hub. The scene then shifts from the open, billboard-lined plaza into the enclosed space of a multi-level parking garage, where the vibrant neon gives way to artificial lighting and blue accent strips. Finally, the camera advances past concrete pillars to reveal a group of characters gathered around a red car with its hood open, surrounded by tool chests and metal roll-up doors.
